rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in AGREE binary expressions by ensuring left and right sides are of identical types.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes; use implementation scopes for such constructs.
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers and declared helpers.
Ensure type declarations in AGREE use valid scalar types (int, real, bool) matching AADL data types.
When generating contracts, ensure guarantees relate visible inputs to visible outputs without referencing subcomponent paths in type scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Place assumptions and guarantees in appropriate annex scopes: type annexes for component-level contracts, implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the input AADL model.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for component-level contracts.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and insertion location decisions
